title: SEO Knowledge OS Cut B — Refresh Queue Producer
intent: Activate the existing seo_refresh_queue with a deterministic bridge producer sourced exclusively from v_seo_content_node_ssot. No new queue, no new content table, no AI augmentation.

actions.name: fn_enqueue_seo_refresh_candidates
actions.purpose: Deterministic producer over the SSOT view; idempotent per (content_type, content_id, reason, day).

reuse_candidates: public.seo_refresh_queue (existing queue — extended via producer, never duplicated)
duplication_risk: none — no new queue, no new content table, no shadow audit
governance_risk: low — producer is service_role only, admin wrapper enforces has_role
migration_strategy: additive only; existing producers and consumers untouched
recommended_extension_points: Add reason-specific consumers downstream (Cut C will route via seo_refresh_queue)
Future: extend reasons (e.g. internal_link_drift) without schema change
